title: Bridge Essay: Consciousness, 4E cognition and Aristotle: a few conceptual and historical aspec

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mind as Computer Critique** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** 4E cognition — embodied, enactive, extended, embedded mind.

**Consciousness, 4E cognition and Aristotle: afew conceptual and historical aspects.**. Front Comput Neurosci.. PMID: 38077752. DOI: 10.3389/fncom.2023.1204602. The new approach in cognitive science largely known as "4E cognition" (embodied/embedded/enactive/extended cognition), which sheds new light on the complex dynamics of human consciousness, seems to revive some of Aristotle'sviews. For instance, the concept of "nature" (phusis) and the discussion on "active intellect" (nous poiêtikos) may be particularly relevant in this respect.
